name: Firecrawl Browser
description: Launch and control browser sessions via Firecrawl Browser Sandbox API. Open PDFs, interact with JS-heavy pages, click elements, fill forms, and navigate dynamic content.

action.description: Action to perform: 'create' (new session), 'execute' (run code in session), 'list' (list sessions), 'close' (delete session), 'shorthand' (quick command with auto-session)

code.description: Code to execute (Playwright for node/python, or agent-browser commands for bash). E.g. 'agent-browser open https://example.com' or 'await page.goto("https://example.com")'

language.description: Language for code execution: 'bash' (agent-browser CLI), 'node' (JavaScript/Playwright), 'python' (Python/Playwright). Default: 'bash'

ttl.description: Session max lifetime in seconds (30-3600). Default: 300

activityTtl.description: Auto-close after inactivity in seconds (10-3600). Default: 120
